title: webhook — Eloquent observers
description: Two observers on the two entities. Enforce state machine + auto-disable + rotation grace window cleanup.

handles: creating → generate signing secret if not provided (server-side 32-byte random)
creating → validate destination_config against destination driver's schema
updating (state=active from previous state) → fire WebhookSubscriptionResumed
updating (state=disabled) → fire WebhookSubscriptionDisabled + dispatch admin notification
updating (secret changed with rotation intent) → fire WebhookSecretRotated + move current secret to secret_previous + set secret_previous_expires_at = now() + rotation_grace_seconds
updating (api_version changed) → validate new version exists + is released/deprecated (not sunset)
saving → refuse changes to is_system=true rows unless super_admin
deleting → refuse hard-delete when active deliveries in-flight; queue for cleanup after in-flight settle
updated (state=delivered) → fire WebhookDelivered + reset parent subscription.consecutive_failure_count to 0
updated (state=failedRetryable) → fire WebhookDeliveryFailed + increment parent subscription.consecutive_failure_count

updated (state=failedPermanent) → fire WebhookDeliveryFailedPermanent + increment consecutive_failure_count + check threshold + auto-disable subscription if reached OR if response_status=410 (immediate disable regardless of threshold)
